title: Command Center Command Center operational state surface
summary: This feature delivery ships Command Center Command Center as the default operator landing inside the ten-surface shell. The client redirects / to /command-center, composes (command-center)/layout.tsx with CommandCenterNavRail, optional inspector, and mobile tabs, and renders six card regions from existing GET…
